roles.title: Platform Delivery & Support Specialist
bullets: Delivered end-to-end digital platform rollouts by driving system readiness, executing deployments, and achieving 95% user adoption within the first month while improving operational efficiency by 30%
Managed end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to launch, defining product vision and translating stakeholder insights into actionable, prioritized requirements for Agile development teams

Led the successful delivery of a digital product by coordinating the integration of multiple systems including CRM, payment platforms, Mobile App, Web App, and backend services, ensuring seamless data flow and end-to-end functionality
Acted as the bridge between business users, engineers, and external vendors to deliver and continuously enhance platforms while resolving system performance issues within SLA
Executed UAT and supported go-live activities to ensure smooth deployments with minimal disruption, while tracking platform performance and driving data-informed operational improvements
Designed and delivered training workshops and end-user guides for 200+ users, significantly enhancing platform usability and sustained adoption

roles.title: Retail Experience Executive
bullets: Managed 50+ daily customer interactions, delivering end-to-end support across Telecom and M-PESA services including onboarding, account updates, transactions, and payments
Drove sales performance by identifying customer needs and executing up-selling and cross-selling strategies to consistently exceed 100% of monthly targets across Consumer and Enterprise segments
Maintained 100% KYC compliance, resolved customer issues within SLA timelines, and managed inventory with full system-to-stock alignment

roles.title: Sales Operations Support Team Lead
bullets: Led a team supporting 50+ field sales agents, ensuring efficient system usage, operational coordination, and SLA compliance for escalated issue resolution
Developed tracking mechanisms for decoder sales, activations, and team tasks, enhancing performance monitoring and operational visibility
Trained 10+ team members and field agents on platform usage and operational procedures, and reduced payment errors by improving subscription payment processes

roles.title: Customer Service Representative
bullets: Assisted 80+ customers daily with service requests, account support, and product inquiries, maintaining high service standards and resolving complaints efficiently
Trained and mentored new staff on service procedures and best practices, improving onboarding consistency and service quality across the team
Processed subscription payments, issued receipts, and managed sales inventory with 100% alignment between system records and physical stock
